text:
Once upon a time in a small seaside town...

There lived an owl named Old owl Bill. He liked nothing better than spending nights patrolling the ocean cliffs.

One peaceful evening, Old Bill noticed something unusual—a new kind of fish gliding smoothly through the waters. Intrigued, he flew closer.

He saw that these were pelicans! They were unlike any he'd seen before. Bill watched them glide around his favorite spot.

Then one flew right into his favourite branch.

"Pfft."

Old Bill tried to scuttle away. But the pelican just stretched her huge neck and said with a cheerful whistle.

"Polly Wanna biscuit?"

Of course! Who wouldn't want just one?

That evening, Old Bill had himself a good snuggle with Polly.

In between feathers, he regaled her with tales of his hunts. Always excited about tales of birds. Polly couldn't resist—hearing about her own remarkable swoops through clouds brought her joy.

And so, old owl bill became a
